products.name: Example Gentle Cleanser

key_ingredients.name: Example Amino Surfactant
key_ingredients.notes: Mild cleansing agent suitable for sensitive and dry skin

key_ingredients.name: Glycerin
key_ingredients.notes: Classic humectant that helps retain moisture

key_ingredients.name: Panthenol
key_ingredients.notes: Soothing and supportive of barrier repair

not_recommended_for: very oily skin seeking a deep-cleansing formula

usage.how_to: Lather in wet hands and massage gently, then rinse with lukewarm water
usage.frequency: Once or twice daily; dry or sensitive skin may cleanse with water only in the morning and use cleanser in the evening

live_talking_points: Built around a mild amino-acid surfactant, does not strip skin after rinsing
A good entry-level cleanser for dry or sensitive skin types
Pairs well with the example moisturiser in this catalogue
products.compliance_disclaimer: Patch test recommended before first use on sensitive skin.

ingredient_glossary.Example Amino Surfactant: A mild cleansing agent derived from amino acids, generally well tolerated by dry and sensitive skin.
ingredient_glossary.Glycerin: A common humectant that helps the skin retain moisture.
ingredient_glossary.Panthenol: A form of vitamin B5 used for soothing and supporting skin barrier repair.
